title: How do I open the user profile modal?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Given a user_id, for a user, I’d like to open the profile of the user like so:

Screenshot 2024-05-11 at 12.54.182520×1362 257 KB

Rather than just navigating to https://:slug.monday.com/users/:user_id I’d like to open the modal over the top of the existing content, so that when the modal is closed, we continue from where we left off.

Looking in the docs for monday.execute, I can’t find a suitable openUserProfileModal that would achieve this.

If it’s not possible, then please @Matias.Monday convert this into a feature request so I can get voting.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @dvdsmpsn,

I have turned this into a request

Thank you for it!!
